issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases.
No realistic examples are provided to illustrate usage.

scenarios.name: design-cache-interface
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fail to meet the rubric: they provide only two designs, lack usage examples, hidden complexity, trade‑offs, comparison, recommendation, and mention of the Task tool.

scenarios.name: design-notification-interface
scenarios.rationale: Both responses lack the required three designs and Task tool mention; A covers more rubric items than B.
